name: RPlog_The_Fate_of_Sabrina_and_Johanna
title: The Fate of Sabrina and Johanna
summary: In a cramped, secured office on a military base, the Jedi Johanna, whose soul currently inhabits the spacer Arenth's body, nervously summons Luke Skywalker to confess a buried memory: during her time serving the Dark Side she stole Sabrina from Boba Fett and had her frozen in carbonite to deliver to Vadim, but cannot recall where she hid her. Luke, refusing to grow angry, reassures the terrified Johanna and urges calm. The Horansi Snarl arrives mid-confession, wary of Johanna after past grievances over the destruction of Cochran, yet softening as she witnesses the disturbing struggle. As Vadim's dark presence intrudes on Johanna's mind, mockingly unlocking memories, it forces the location to surface: Nar Shaddaa. Luke telepathically instructs Snarl to inform her husband Zik, and once the dark presence withdraws, the dazed Johanna remembers little, leaving Luke and Snarl quietly holding the crucial clue to Sabrina's whereabouts.
